The target gains no benefit from Half {@variantrule Cover|XPHB} or Three-Quarters {@variantrule Cover|XPHB} for this save.
Sacred Flame.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: Урон увеличивается на {@damage 1d8}, когда вы достигаете 5-го ({@damage 2d8}), 11-го ({@damage 3d8}) и 17-го ({@damage 4d8}) уровней.
Sacred Flame.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Улучшение заговора
Sacred Flame.name: Sacred Flame
Sacrificial Siphon.entries.0: You touch another creature and lay a curse that drains the target's vitality and transfers it to you. The target must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target is cursed for the duration. While cursed, the target must subtract {@dice 1d4} from its attack rolls and ability checks, and when the target takes damage, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to gain 10 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}. On a successful save, you gain 5 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, and the target must subtract {@dice 1d4} from its ability checks until the start of your next turn.
Sacrificial Siphon.name: Sacrificial Siphon
Sanctuary.components.m: a shard of glass from a mirror
Sanctuary.entries.0: You ward a creature within range. Until the spell ends, any creature who targets the warded creature with an attack roll or a damaging spell must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or either choose a new target or lose the attack or spell. This spell doesn't protect the warded creature from areas of effect.
Sanctuary.entries.1: The spell ends if the warded creature makes an attack roll, casts a spell, or deals damage.
Sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
Sanctum of the Flock.components.m: powdered silver worth 25+ GP, which the spell consumes
Sanctum of the Flock.entries.0: You create a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} of faint, shimmering light centered on a point within range. You and a number of creatures of your choice up to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of 1 other creature) can absorb empowering magic from the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere}. When any of the chosen creatures finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} in the area, the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} vanishes, and those creatures gain {@dice 2d10} {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, and for the remainder of the duration, they have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Charisma checks that use one of their skill proficiencies. Chosen creatures who don't finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} in the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} gain no benefit.
Sanctum of the Flock.name: Sanctum of the Flock
Sanctum of the Shepherd.components.m: adamantine or diamond powder worth 200+ GP, which the spell consumes
Sanctum of the Shepherd.entries.0: You create a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} of faint, shimmering light centered on a point within range. You and  a number of creatures of your choice up to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of 1 other creature) can absorb protective magic from the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere}. When any of the chosen creatures finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} in the area, the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} vanishes, and those creatures gain a +1 bonus to AC for the remainder of the duration. Chosen creatures who don't finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} in the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} gain no benefit.
Sanctum of the Shepherd.name: Sanctum of the Shepherd
Sanguine Fusillade.components.m: a needle dipped in your blood
Sanguine Fusillade.entries.0: You crystalize your foe's blood into razor darts that burst forth to strike your enemies. As part of casting this spell, you must expend seven {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} or the spell automatically fails. Roll the {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} expended to cast the spell. Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target takes Piercing damage equal to the roll. When a creature takes this damage, seven crimson darts burst from it.
Sanguine Fusillade.entries.1: You can direct each dart to hit a creature within 60 feet of the original target. The darts all strike simultaneously, and you can direct them to hit one creature or several, including the original target. For each dart, make a ranged spell attack against the chosen creature. On a hit, roll one {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Point Die} expended to cast the spell, and the creature takes Piercing damage equal to the number rolled.
You can expend an additional {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Point Die} and create another dart for each spell slot level above 7.
Sanguine Fusillade.name: Sanguine Fusillade
Sanguine Poppet.components.m: an object shaped like a creature worth 1+ CP
Sanguine Poppet.entries.0: As part of casting this spell, you must expend three {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} or the spell automatically fails. You smear the spell's Material component with your blood. The object shudders and becomes a poppet under your control.
Sanguine Poppet.entries.1: The poppet's AC equals 10 plus your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} and your spellcasting ability modifier, and it has 30 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. If your poppet is ever reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or it is more than 1 mile away, the spell ends immediately. As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can command your poppet to move 30 feet, and you can see and hear through it until the start of your next turn.
Sanguine Poppet.entries.2: As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can cause the poppet to detonate in an explosion of blood, ending this spell. Roll the {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} expended to cast this spell. Each creature in a 30-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on the poppet makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking Necrotic damage equal to the roll on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
Sanguine Poppet.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: You can expend an additional {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Point Die} for each spell slot level above 3. Additionally, the duration of this spell increases by 1 hour for each spell slot level above 3.
Sanguine Poppet.name: Sanguine Poppet
Sanguine Secrets.components.m: a drop of blood, which the spell consumes
Sanguine Secrets.entries.0: You draw knowledge through the power of blood about a creature you can see within range. You learn the target's species and creature type, its current {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and any conditions affecting it. You also learn if it has any of the following, and, if so, what they are: {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB}, {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB}, or {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to damage  or conditions. Additionally, the next ability check or attack roll you make against the target before the end of your next turn has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.
Sanguine Secrets.name: Sanguine Secrets
Sanguine Shield.entries.0: As part of casting this spell, you must expend two {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} or the spell automatically fails. You draw lifeforce from those injured around you to create a swirling shield of blood. You gain 5 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} for each creature within 30 feet of you that is below its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum (including you) to a maximum of 15 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}. While you have {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} from this spell, you have {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Half Cover}. When the spell ends, all {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} from it are lost.
Sanguine Shield.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: The maximum number of {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} you gain increases by 5 for each two spell slot levels above 2.
Sanguine Shield.name: Sanguine Shield
Sapping Sting.entries.0: You sap the vitality of one creature you can see in range. The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take {@damage 1d4} necrotic damage and fall {@condition prone}.
Sapping Sting.entries.1: This spell's damage increases by {@damage 1d4} when you reach 5th level ({@damage 2d4}), 11th level ({@damage 3d4}), and 17th level ({@damage 4d4}).
Sapping Sting.name: Sapping Sting
Scarlet Dawn.entries.0: Crimson light shines down in a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} centered on a point within range. Each creature in that area that isn't a Construct or Undead must make a Constitution saving throw, taking {@damage 4d10} Necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Constructs and Undead in the area regain {@dice 4d10} {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.
Scarlet Dawn.entries.1: If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} created by a spell of level 3 or lower, that other spell is dispelled.
Scarlet Dawn.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: The damage increases by {@dice 1d10} and the level of spell that can be dispelled increases by 1 for each spell slot level above 3.
Scarlet Dawn.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Scarlet Dawn.name: Scarlet Dawn
Scatter.entries.0: The air quivers around up to five creatures of your choice that you can see within range. An unwilling creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw to resist this spell. You teleport each affected target to an unoccupied space that you can see within 120 feet of you. That space must be on the ground or on a floor.
Scatter.name: Scatter
Scorching Ray.entries.0: You hurl three fiery rays. You can hurl them at one target within range or at several. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 2d6} Fire damage.
Scorching Ray.entriesHigherLevel.0.entri: You create one additional ray for each spell slot level above 2.
Scorching Ray.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Scorching Ray.name: Scorching Ray
Scrying.components.m: a focus worth 1,000+ GP, such as a crystal ball, mirror, or water-filled font
Scrying.entries.0: You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.
Scrying.entries.1.colLabels.0: Your Knowledge of the Target Is...
Scrying.entries.2.rows.2.0: Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail
Scrying.entries.3: On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.
Scrying.entries.4: On a failed save, the spell creates an {@condition Invisible|XPHB}, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.
Scrying.entries.5: Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.
Scrying.name: Scrying
Seal Spellcasting.components.m: wax mixed with lead and a stamp
Seal Spellcasting.entries.0: When you cast this spell, choose a creature you can see within range. When the target casts a spell, it must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the creature expends a spell slot to cast the spell as normal but the spell has no effect. On a successful save, the creature casts the spell but takes {@damage 3d8} Force damage. After the creature makes a saving throw, the spell immediately ends.
Seal Spellcasting.entriesHigherLevel.0.e: The damage increases by {@dice 1d8} for each spell slot above level 2.
Seal Spellcasting.name: Seal Spellcasting
Searing Smite.entries.0: As you hit the target, it takes an extra {@damage 1d6} Fire damage from the attack. At the start of each of its turns until the spell ends, the target takes {@damage 1d6} Fire damage and then makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the spell continues. On a successful save, the spell ends.
Searing Smite.entriesHigherLevel.0.entri: All the damage increases by {@scaledamage 1d6|1-9|1d6} for each spell slot level above 1.
Searing Smite.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Searing Smite.name: Searing Smite
See Invisibility.entries.0: For the duration, you see creatures and objects that have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition as if they were visible, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane. Creatures and objects there appear ghostly.
See Invisibility.name: See Invisibility
Seeming.entries.0: You give an illusory appearance to each creature of your choice that you can see within range. An unwilling target can make a Charisma saving throw, and if it succeeds, it is unaffected by this spell.
Seeming.entries.1: You can give the same appearance or different ones to the targets. The spell can change the appearance of the targets' bodies and equipment. You can make each creature seem 1 foot shorter or taller and appear heavier or lighter. A target's new appearance must have the same basic arrangement of limbs as the target, but the extent of the illusion is otherwise up to you. The spell lasts for the duration.
Seeming.entries.2: The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to a creature's outfit, objects pass through the hat.
Seeming.entries.3: A creature that takes the {@action Study|XPHB} action to examine a target can make an Intelligence ({@skill Investigation|XPHB}) check against your spell save DC. If it succeeds, it becomes aware that the target is disguised.
Seeming.name: Seeming
Sending.entries.0: You send a short message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you have met or a creature described to you by someone who has met it. The target hears the message in its mind, recognizes you as the sender if it knows you, and can answer in a like manner immediately. The spell enables targets to understand the meaning of your message.
Sending.entries.1: You can send the message across any distance and even to other planes of existence, but if the target is on a different plane than you, there is a {@chance 5|||Message lost!|Message arrives} chance that the message doesn't arrive. You know if the delivery fails.
Sending.entries.2: Upon receiving your message, a creature can block your ability to reach it again with this spell for 8 hours. If you try to send another message during that time, you learn that you are blocked, and the spell fails.
Sending.name: Sending
Sense Lifeblood.entries.0: As part of casting this spell, you must expend two {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} or the spell automatically fails. The lifeblood flowing within creatures tells you its secrets. Creatures that have {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} condition are {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immune} to this spell. Until the spell ends, you can determine if creatures you can see are related biologically. In addition, you know if a creature's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} are at maximum, below maximum, at half, or below half.
Sense Lifeblood.entries.1: Once on each of your turns when you hit a {@condition Bloodied|XPHB} creature with an attack roll using a weapon, {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, or spell, you can cause the target to take extra Necrotic. To determine this damage, roll the {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} expended to cast the spell.
Sense Lifeblood.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: Your {@status Concentration|XPHB} can last longer with a spell slot of level 3-4 (up to 1 hour) or 5+ (up to 8 hours).
Sense Lifeblood.name: Sense Lifeblood
Sequester.components.m: gem dust worth 5,000+ GP, which the spell consumes
Sequester.entries.0: With a touch, you magically sequester an object or a willing creature. For the duration, the target has the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition and can't be targeted by Divination spells, detected by magic, or viewed remotely with magic.
Sequester.entries.1: If the target is a creature, it enters a state of suspended animation; it has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition, doesn't age, and doesn't need food, water, or air.
Sequester.entries.2: You can set a condition for the spell to end early. The condition can be anything you choose, but it must occur or be visible within 1 mile of the target. Examples include "after 1,000 years" or "when the tarrasque awakens." This spell also ends if the target takes any damage.
Sequester.name: Sequester
Serpent Tongue.entries.0: You transform your tongue into a poisonous serpent for the duration. As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can make a melee spell attack against a creature within 10 feet of you. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 1d12} Piercing damage and has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for the duration of the spell.
Serpent Tongue.entriesHigherLevel.0.entr: The damage increases by {@dice 1d12} for every spell slot level above 3.
Serpent Tongue.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Serpent Tongue.name: Serpent Tongue
Shadow Blade.entries.0: You weave together threads of shadow to create a sword of solidified gloom in your hand. This magic sword lasts until the spell ends. It counts as a simple melee weapon with which you are proficient. It deals {@damage 2d8} psychic damage on a hit and has the finesse, light, and thrown properties (range 20/60). In addition, when you use the sword to attack a target that is in dim light or darkness, you make the attack roll with advantage.
Shadow Blade.entries.1: If you drop the weapon or throw it, it dissipates at the end of the turn. Thereafter, while the spell persists, you can use a bonus action to cause the sword to reappear in your hand.
Shadow Blade.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: When you cast this spell using a 3rd- or 4th-level spell slot, the damage increases to {@damage 3d8}. When you cast it using a 5th- or 6th-level spell slot, the damage increases to {@damage 4d8}. When you cast it using a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the damage increases to {@damage 5d8}.
Shadow Blade.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: На более высоких уровнях
Shadow Blade.name: Shadow Blade
Shadow Drain.entries.0: You siphon away the vitality and sense of self through the shadows of nearby creatures in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from you.
Shadow Drain.entries.1: When you cast this spell, you can designate creatures to be unaffected by it. Whenever any other creature enters the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} or starts its turn there, or when the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} enters a creature's space, the creature must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes {@damage 2d6} Necrotic damage and has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage only. A creature makes this save only once per turn.
Shadow Drain.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: The damage increases by {@dice 1d6} for each spell slot level above 3.
Shadow Drain.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Shadow Drain.name: Shadow Drain
Shadow of Moil.components.m: an undead eyeball encased in a gem worth at least 150 gp
Shadow of Moil.entries.0: Flame-like shadows wreathe your body until the spell ends, causing you to become heavily obscured to others. The shadows turn dim light within 10 feet of you into darkness, and bright light in the same area to dim light.
Shadow of Moil.entries.1: Until the spell ends, you have resistance to radiant damage. In addition, whenever a creature within 10 feet of you hits you with an attack, the shadows lash out at that creature, dealing it {@damage 2d8} necrotic damage.
Shadow of Moil.name: Shadow of Moil
Shape Water.entries.0: You choose an area of water that you can see within range and that fits within a 5-foot cube. You manipulate it in one of the following ways:
Shape Water.entries.1.items.0: You instantaneously move or otherwise change the flow of the water as you direct, up to 5 feet in any direction. This movement doesn't have enough force to cause damage.
Shape Water.entries.1.items.1: You cause the water to form into simple shapes and animate at your direction. This change lasts for 1 hour.
Shape Water.entries.1.items.2: You change the water's color or opacity. The water must be changed in the same way throughout. This change lasts for 1 hour.
Shape Water.entries.1.items.3: You freeze the water, provided that there are no creatures in it. The water unfreezes in 1 hour.
Shape Water.entries.2: If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have no more than two of its non-instantaneous effects active at a time, and you can dismiss such an effect as an action.
Shape Water.name: Shape Water
Shapechange.entries.0: You shape-shift into another creature for the duration or until you take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to shape-shift into a different eligible form. The new form must be of a creature that has a {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB} no higher than your level or {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB}. You must have seen the sort of creature before, and it can't be a Construct or an Undead.
Shapechange.entries.1: When you cast the spell, you gain a number of {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} of the first form into which you shape-shift. These {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} vanish if any remain when the spell ends.
Shapechange.entries.2: Your game statistics are replaced by the stat block of the chosen form, but you retain your creature type; alignment; personality; Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}; {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB}; proficiencies; and ability to communicate. If you have the Spellcasting feature, you retain it too.
Shapechange.entries.3: Upon shape-shifting, you determine whether your equipment drops to the ground or changes in size and shape to fit the new form while you're in it.
Shapechange.name: Shapechange
Shared Judgement.entries.0: Once on each of your turns when you reduce an Undead to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, you can deal {@damage 5d6} Radiant damage to a creature you can see within 60 feet of you no action required.
Shared Judgement.entriesHigherLevel.0.en: The damage increases by {@dice 1d6} for each spell slot level above 4.
Shared Judgement.name: Shared Judgement
Shatter.entries.0: A loud noise erupts from a point of your choice within range. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered there makes a Constitution saving throw, taking {@damage 3d8} Thunder damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A Construct has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the save.
Shatter.entries.1: A nonmagical object that isn't being worn or carried also takes the damage if it's in the spell's area.
Shatter.entriesHigherLevel.0.entries.0: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 3d8|2-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 2.
Shatter.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Shatter.name: Shatter
Shield of Faith.entries.0: A shimmering field surrounds a creature of your choice within range, granting it a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.
Shield of Faith.name: Shield of Faith
Shield.entries.0: An imperceptible barrier of magical force protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from {@spell Magic Missile|XPHB}.
Shield.name: Щит
Shillelagh.entries.0: Дерево Дубинки или Боевого посоха в ваших руках наполняется силой природы. Пока заклинание действует, вы можете использовать вашу заклинательную характеристику вместо Силы для бросков атаки и урона при совершении рукопашных атак этим оружием, а кость его урона становится {@dice d8}. Если такая атака наносит урон, то его тип может быть обычным типом этой атаки или Силовым уроном (на ваш выбор).
Shillelagh.entries.1: Заклинание заканчивается, если вы сотворите его ещё раз или выпустите оружие из рук.
Урон оружия изменяется, когда вы достигаете 5-го ({@damage d10}), 11-го ({@damage d12}) и 17-го ({@damage 2d6}) уровней.
Shillelagh.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Улучшение заговора
Shillelagh.name: Шилейла
Shining Smite.entries.0: The target hit by the strike takes an extra {@damage 2d6} Radiant damage from the attack. Until the spell ends, the target sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 5-foot radius, attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}, and it can't benefit from the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.
Shining Smite.entriesHigherLevel.0.entri: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 2d6|2-9|1d6} for each spell slot level above 2.
Shining Smite.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Shining Smite.name: Shining Smite
Shocking Grasp.entries.0: Lightning springs from you to a creature that you try to touch. Make a melee spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 1d8} Lightning damage, and it can't make {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} until the start of its next turn.
Shocking Grasp.entriesHigherLevel.0.entr: Урон увеличивается на {@damage 1d8}, когда вы достигаете 5-го ({@damage 2d8}), 11-го ({@damage 3d8}) и 17-го ({@damage 4d8}) уровней.
Shocking Grasp.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Улучшение заговора
Shocking Grasp.name: Shocking Grasp
Shroud Blood.entries.0: As part of casting this spell, you must expend one {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Point Die} or the spell automatically fails.  You can choose yourself or a willing creature within 30 feet of yourself to have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth|XPHB}) checks. When the target loses the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition, it can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to gain the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition for a number of rounds equal to the number of {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} expended to cast the spell. The target loses the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition immediately after it makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.
Shroud Blood.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: You can target an additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.
Shroud Blood.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Shroud Blood.name: Shroud Blood
Sickening Radiance.entries.0: Dim, greenish light spreads within a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range. The light spreads around corners, and it lasts until the spell ends.
Sickening Radiance.entries.1: When a creature moves into the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, that creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take {@damage 4d10} radiant damage, and it suffers one level of {@condition exhaustion} and emits a dim, greenish light in a 5-foot radius. This light makes it impossible for the creature to benefit from being {@condition invisible}. The light and any levels of {@condition exhaustion} caused by this spell go away when the spell ends.
Sickening Radiance.name: Sickening Radiance
Silence.entries.0: For the duration, no sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point you choose within range. Any creature or object entirely inside the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Thunder damage, and creatures have the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} condition while entirely inside it. Casting a spell that includes a Verbal component is impossible there.
Silence.name: Silence
Silent Image.entries.0: You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 15-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}. The image appears at a spot within range and lasts for the duration. The image is purely visual; it isn't accompanied by sound, smell, or other sensory effects.
Silent Image.entries.1: As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can cause the image to move to any spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. For example, if you create an image of a creature and move it, you can alter the image so that it appears to be walking.
Silent Image.entries.2: Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, since things can pass through it. A creature that takes a {@action Study|XPHB} action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence ({@skill Investigation|XPHB}) check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the creature can see through the image.
Silent Image.name: Silent Image
Silvery Barbs.entries.0: You magically distract the triggering creature and turn its momentary uncertainty into encouragement for another creature. The triggering creature must reroll the {@dice d20} and use the lower roll.
Silvery Barbs.entries.1: You can then choose a different creature you can see within range (you can choose yourself). The chosen creature has advantage on the next attack roll, ability check, or saving throw it makes within 1 minute. A creature can be empowered by only one use of this spell at a time.
Silvery Barbs.name: Silvery Barbs
Simbul's Synostodweomer.entries.0: You imbue one creature you touch with magical healing energy for the duration. Whenever the target casts a spell using a spell slot, the target can immediately roll a number of unexpended {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} equal to the spell slot's level and regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the roll's total plus your spellcasting ability modifier; those dice are then expended.
Simbul's Synostodweomer.name: Simbul's Synostodweomer
Simulacrum.components.m: powdered ruby worth 1,500+ GP, which the spell consumes
Simulacrum.entries.0: You create a simulacrum of one Beast or Humanoid that is within 10 feet of you for the entire casting of the spell. You finish the casting by touching both the creature and a pile of ice or snow that is the same size as that creature, and the pile turns into the simulacrum, which is a creature. It uses the game statistics of the original creature at the time of casting, except it is a Construct, its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is half as much, and it can't cast this spell.
Simulacrum.entries.1: The simulacrum is {@variantrule Friendly [Attitude]|XPHB|Friendly} to you and creatures you designate. It obeys your commands and acts on your turn in combat. The simulacrum can't gain levels, and it can't take Short or Long Rests.
Simulacrum.entries.2: If the simulacrum takes damage, the only way to restore its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} is to repair it as you take a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, during which you expend components worth 100 GP per {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} restored. The simulacrum must stay within 5 feet of you for the repair.
Simulacrum.entries.3: The simulacrum lasts until it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, at which point it reverts to snow and melts away. If you cast this spell again, any simulacrum you created with this spell is instantly destroyed.
Simulacrum.name: Simulacrum
Skill Empowerment.entries.0: Your magic deepens a creature's understanding of its own talent. You touch one willing creature and give it expertise in one skill of your choice; until the spell ends, the creature doubles its proficiency bonus for ability checks it makes that use the chosen skill.
Skill Empowerment.entries.1: You must choose a skill in which the target is proficient and that isn't already benefiting from an effect, such as Expertise, that doubles its proficiency bonus.
Skill Empowerment.name: Skill Empowerment
Skywrite.entries.0: You cause up to ten words to form in a part of the sky you can see. The words appear to be made of cloud and remain in place for the spell's duration. The words dissipate when the spell ends. A strong wind can disperse the clouds and end the spell early.
Skywrite.name: Skywrite
Sleep.components.m: a pinch of sand or rose petals
Sleep.entries.0: Each creature of your choice in a 5-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn, at which point it must repeat the save. If the target fails the second save, the target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for the duration. The spell ends on a target if it takes damage or someone within 5 feet of it takes an action to shake it out of the spell's effect.
Sleep.entries.1: Creatures that don't sleep, such as elves, or that have {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} condition automatically succeed on saves against this spell.
Sleep.name: Сон
Sleet Storm.entries.0: Until the spell ends, sleet falls in a 40-foot-tall, 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} centered on a point you choose within range. The area is {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB}, and exposed flames in the area are doused.
Sleet Storm.entries.1: Ground in the {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. When a creature enters the {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition and lose {@status Concentration|XPHB}.
Sleet Storm.name: Sleet Storm
Slow.entries.0: You alter time around up to six creatures of your choice in a 40-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} within range. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be affected by this spell for the duration.
Slow.entries.1: An affected target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved, it takes a -2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws, and it can't take Reactions. On its turns, it can take either an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, not both, and it can make only one attack if it takes the {@action Attack|XPHB} action. If it casts a spell with a Somatic component, there is a {@chance 25|||The spell fails!|The spell does not fail.} chance the spell fails as a result of the target making the spell's gestures too slowly.
Slow.entries.2: An affected target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on itself on a success.
Slow.name: Замедление
Snare.components.m: 25 feet of rope, which the spell consumes
Snare.entries.0: As you cast this spell, you use the rope to create a circle with a 5-foot radius on the ground or the floor. When you finish casting, the rope disappears and the circle becomes a magic trap.
Snare.entries.1: This trap is nearly invisible, requiring a successful Intelligence ({@skill Investigation}) check against your spell save DC to be discerned.
Snare.entries.2: The trap triggers when a Small, Medium, or Large creature moves onto the ground or the floor in the spell's radius. That creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or be magically hoisted into the air, leaving it hanging upside down 3 feet above the ground or the floor. The creature is {@condition restrained} there until the spell ends.
Snare.entries.3: A {@condition restrained} creature can make a Dexterity saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Alternatively, the creature or someone else who can reach it can use an action to make an Intelligence ({@skill Arcana}) check against your spell save DC. On a success, the {@condition restrained} effect ends.
Snare.entries.4: After the trap is triggered, the spell ends when no creature is {@condition restrained} by it.
Snare.name: Snare
Snilloc's Snowball Swarm.components.m: a piece of ice or a small white rock chip
Snilloc's Snowball Swarm.entries.0: A flurry of magic snowballs erupts from a point you choose within range. Each creature in a 5-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes {@damage 3d6} cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Snilloc's Snowball Swarm.entriesHigherLe: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by {@scaledamage 3d6|2-9|1d6} for each slot level above 2nd.
Snilloc's Snowball Swarm.name: Snilloc's Snowball Swarm
Somnolence.components.m: sand mixed with the spellcaster's blood
Somnolence.entries.0: As part of casting this spell, you must expend one {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Point Die} or the spell automatically fails. Roll the {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Point Die} expended to cast the spell plus {@dice 2d12} and choose a creature within range. If the roll's total is equal to or greater than the chosen creature's current {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the creature falls into a magical slumber for 1 minute. If the roll's total is equal to or greater than the chosen creature's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum, the magical slumber lasts for 24 hours instead. The spell ends on a target if it takes damage or someone within 5 feet of it takes an action to shake it out of the spell's effect. A creature woken early from this spell gains 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level.
Somnolence.entries.1: Creatures that don't sleep, such as elves, or that have {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} condition automatically succeed on saves against this spell.
Somnolence.entries.2.entries.0: Adherents of the Prismatic Circle perform a variation of the Somnolence spell that takes 10 minutes and requires the sacrifice of a Humanoid. These adherents believe when the ritual is completed, it staves off the waking of Gormadraug for a day and night. Through the repetitive performance of this ritual, the Druids of the Prismatic Circle hope to ensure Gormadraug slumbers forever.
Somnolence.entries.2.name: The Long Sleep
You roll an additional {@dice 1d12} and can expend an additional two {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} for every spell slot level above 1.
Somnolence.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Somnolence.name: Somnolence
Songal's Elemental Suffusion.entries.0: You imbue yourself with the elemental power of genies. You gain the following benefits until the spell ends:
Songal's Elemental Suffusion.entries.1.i: When you cast this spell, choose one of the following damage types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to the chosen damage type.

When you cast this spell and at the start of each of your subsequent turns, you release a burst of elemental energy in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from yourself. Each creature of your choice in that area makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes {@damage 2d6} Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder damage (your choice) and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only.
You gain a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 30 feet and can hover.
Songal's Elemental Suffusion.entries.2.e: If the spell is cast as a Circle spell, its casting time increases to 1 minute, and its duration increases to {@status Concentration|XPHB}, up to 10 minutes. For each secondary caster who participates in the casting, you can choose one additional creature, to a maximum of nine additional creatures. The chosen creatures also gain the benefits of the spell for its duration.
When the spell is cast, each secondary caster must expend a level 2+ spell slot; otherwise, the spell fails.
Songal's Elemental Suffusion.name: Songal's Elemental Suffusion
Sorcerous Burst.entries.0: You cast sorcerous energy at one creature or object within range. Make a ranged attack roll against the target. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 1d8} damage of a type you choose: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, Psychic, or Thunder.
Sorcerous Burst.entries.1: If you roll an 8 on a {@dice d8} for this spell, you can roll another {@dice d8}, and add it to the damage. When you cast this spell, the maximum number of these d8s you can add to the spell's damage equals your spellcasting ability modifier.
Sorcerous Burst.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: Урон увеличивается на {@damage 1d8}, когда вы достигаете 5-го ({@damage 2d8}), 11-го ({@damage 3d8}) и 17-го ({@damage 4d8}) уровней.
Sorcerous Burst.name: Sorcerous Burst
Soul Cage.components.m: a tiny silver cage worth 100 gp
Soul Cage.entries.0: This spell snatches the soul of a humanoid as it dies and traps it inside the tiny cage you use for the material component. A stolen soul remains inside the cage until the spell ends or until you destroy the cage, which ends the spell. While you have a soul inside the cage, you can exploit it in any of the ways described below. You can use a trapped soul up to six times. Once you exploit a soul for the sixth time, it is released, and the spell ends. While a soul is trapped, the dead humanoid it came from can't be revived.
Soul Cage.entries.1.entries.0: You can use a bonus action to drain vigor from the soul and regain {@dice 2d8} hit points.
Soul Cage.entries.1.name: Steal Life
Soul Cage.entries.2.entries.0: You ask the soul a question (no action required) and receive a brief telepathic answer, which you can understand regardless of the language used. The soul knows only what it knew in life, but it must answer you truthfully and to the best of its ability. The answer is no more than a sentence or two and might be cryptic.
Soul Cage.entries.2.name: Query Soul
Soul Cage.entries.3.entries.0: You can use a bonus action to bolster yourself with the soul's life experience, making your next attack roll, ability check, or saving throw with advantage. If you don't use this benefit before the start of your next turn, it is lost.
Soul Cage.entries.3.name: Borrow Experience
Soul Cage.entries.4.entries.0: You can use an action to name a place the humanoid saw in life, which creates an invisible sensor somewhere in that place if it is on the plane of existence you're currently on. The sensor remains for as long as you concentrate, up to 10 minutes (as if you were {@status concentration||concentrating} on a spell). You receive visual and auditory information from the sensor as if you were in its space using your senses.
Soul Cage.entries.4.name: Eyes of the Dead
Soul Cage.entries.5: A creature that can see the sensor (such as one using {@spell see invisibility} or {@sense truesight}) sees a translucent image of the tormented humanoid whose soul you caged.
Soul Cage.name: Soul Cage
Spare the Dying.entries.0: Choose a creature within range that has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and isn't dead. The creature becomes {@variantrule Stable|XPHB}.
Spare the Dying.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: The range doubles when you reach levels 5 (30 feet), 11 (60 feet), and 17 (120 feet).
Spare the Dying.name: Spare the Dying
Speak with Animals.entries.0: For the duration, you can comprehend and verbally communicate with Beasts, and you can use any of the {@action Influence|XPHB} action's skill options with them.
Speak with Animals.entries.1: Most Beasts have little to say about topics that don't pertain to survival or companionship, but at minimum, a Beast can give you information about nearby locations and monsters, including whatever it has perceived within the past day.
Speak with Animals.name: Speak with Animals
Speak with Dead.entries.0: You grant the semblance of life to a corpse of your choice within range, allowing it to answer questions you pose. The corpse must have a mouth, and this spell fails if the deceased creature was Undead when it died. The spell also fails if the corpse was the target of this spell within the past 10 days.
Speak with Dead.entries.1: Until the spell ends, you can ask the corpse up to five questions. The corpse knows only what it knew in life, including the languages it knew. Answers are usually brief, cryptic, or repetitive, and the corpse is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if you are antagonistic toward it or it recognizes you as an enemy. This spell doesn't return the creature's soul to its body, only its animating spirit. Thus, the corpse can't learn new information, doesn't comprehend anything that has happened since it died, and can't speculate about future events.
Speak with Dead.name: Speak with Dead
Speak with Plants.entries.0: You imbue plants in an immobile 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} with limited sentience and animation, giving them the ability to communicate with you and follow your simple commands. You can question plants about events in the spell's area within the past day, gaining information about creatures that have passed, weather, and other circumstances.
Speak with Plants.entries.1: You can also turn {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} caused by plant growth (such as thickets and undergrowth) into ordinary terrain that lasts for the duration. Or you can turn ordinary terrain where plants are present into {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} that lasts for the duration.
Speak with Plants.entries.2: The spell doesn't enable plants to uproot themselves and move about, but they can move their branches, tendrils, and stalks for you.
Speak with Plants.entries.3: If a Plant creature is in the area, you can communicate with it as if you shared a common language.
Speak with Plants.name: Speak with Plants
Spellfire Flare.entries.0: You unleash a blast of brilliant fire. Make a ranged spell attack against a target within range; a target gains no benefit from {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Half Cover} or {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Three-Quarters Cover} for this attack roll. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 2d10} Radiant damage.
Spellfire Flare.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: You create an additional blast for each spell slot level above 1. You can direct the blasts at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each blast.
Spellfire Flare.name: Spellfire Flare
Spellfire Storm.entries.0: You conjure a pillar of spellfire in a 20-foot-radius, 20-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} centered on a point within range. The area of the {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} is {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}, and each creature in it when it appears makes a Constitution saving throw, taking {@damage 4d10} Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature also makes this save when it enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. A creature makes this save only once per turn.
Spellfire Storm.entries.1: In addition, whenever a creature in the {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} casts a spell, that creature makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the spell dissipates with no effect, and the action, {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, or {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} used to cast it is wasted. If that spell was cast with a spell slot, the slot isn't expended.
Spellfire Storm.entries.2: When you cast this spell, you can designate creatures to be unaffected by it.
Spellfire Storm.entries.3.entries.0: In addition to the spell's usual components, you must provide a special component (a blue star sapphire worth 25,000+ GP), which the spell consumes. The spell's range increases to 1 mile, and it no longer requires {@status Concentration|XPHB}. When the spell is cast, each secondary caster must expend a level 3+ spell slot; otherwise, the spell fails.
Spellfire Storm.entries.3.name: Casting as a Circle Spell
Spellfire Storm.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 4d10|4-9|1d10} for every spell slot level above 4.

The number of secondary casters determines the spell's area of effect and duration, as shown in the table below. The spell ends early if any caster who participated in this casting contributes to another casting of Spellfire Storm as a Circle spell.
Spellfire Storm.name: Spellfire Storm
Spider Climb.components.m: a drop of bitumen and a spider
Spider Climb.entries.0: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving its hands free. The target also gains a {@variantrule Climb Speed|XPHB} equal to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.
Spider Climb.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: Вы можете выбрать одно дополнительное существо за каждый уровень ячейки заклинания выше 2-го.
Spider Climb.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Spider Climb.name: Паучье лазание
Spike Growth.entries.0: The ground in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within range sprouts hard spikes and thorns. The area becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for the duration. When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes {@damage 2d4} Piercing damage for every 5 feet it travels.
Spike Growth.entries.1: The transformation of the ground is camouflaged to look natural. Any creature that can't see the area when the spell is cast must take a {@action Search|XPHB} action and succeed on a Wisdom ({@skill Perception|XPHB} or {@skill Survival|XPHB}) check against your spell save DC to recognize the terrain as hazardous before entering it.
Spike Growth.name: Spike Growth
Spirit Guardians.entries.0: Protective spirits flit around you in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} for the duration. If you are good or neutral, their spectral form appears angelic or fey (your choice). If you are evil, they appear fiendish.
Spirit Guardians.entries.1: When you cast this spell, you can designate creatures to be unaffected by it. Any other creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, and whenever the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} enters a creature's space and whenever a creature enters the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} or ends its turn there, the creature must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes {@damage 3d8} Radiant damage (if you are good or neutral) or {@damage 3d8} Necrotic damage (if you are evil). On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage. A creature makes this save only once per turn.
Spirit Guardians.entriesHigherLevel.0.en: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 3d8|3-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 3.
Spirit Guardians.name: Spirit Guardians
Spirit Shroud.entries.0: You call forth spirits of the dead, which flit around you for the spell's duration. The spirits are intangible and invulnerable.
Spirit Shroud.entries.1: Until the spell ends, any attack you make deals {@damage 1d8} extra damage when you hit a creature within 10 feet of you. This damage is radiant, necrotic, or cold (your choice when you cast the spell). Any creature that takes this damage can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn.
Spirit Shroud.entries.2: In addition, any creature of your choice that you can see that starts its turn within 10 feet of you has its speed reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
Spirit Shroud.entriesHigherLevel.0.entri: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by {@scaledamage 1d8|3,5,7,9|1d8} for every two slot levels above 3rd.
Spirit Shroud.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: На более высоких уровнях
Spirit Shroud.name: Spirit Shroud
Spirit Swarm.entries.0: You invite spirits to take their revenge upon a target. A creature you can see within range must make a Charisma saving throw. The target must have a Charisma of 3 or higher. On a failed save, the target takes {@damage 8d8} Psychic damage and has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the spell ends. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage only.
Spirit Swarm.name: Spirit Swarm
Spirit of Death.components.m: a gilded playing card worth at least 400 gp and depicting an avatar of death
Spirit of Death.entries.0: You call forth a spirit that embodies death. The spirit manifests in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the {@creature reaper spirit|BMT} stat block. The spirit disappears when it is reduced to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.
Spirit of Death.entries.1: The spirit is an ally to you and your companions. In combat, the spirit shares your initiative count and takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue the spirit any commands, it takes the {@action Dodge} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Spirit of Death.entriesHigherLevel.0.ent: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, use the higher level wherever the spell's level appears in the reaper spirit stat block.
Spirit of Death.name: Spirit of Death
Spiritual Weapon.entries.0: You create a floating, spectral force that resembles a weapon of your choice and lasts for the duration. The force appears within range in a space of your choice, and you can immediately make one melee spell attack against one creature within 5 feet of the force. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to {@damage 1d8} plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
Spiritual Weapon.entries.1: As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on your later turns, you can move the force up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it.
Spiritual Weapon.entriesHigherLevel.0.en: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 1d8|2-9|1d8} for every slot level above 2.
Spiritual Weapon.name: Spiritual Weapon
Splattering Smite.entries.0: Your strikes drink the splattered blood of your foes. As part of casting this spell, you must expend five {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice} or the spell automatically fails. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a Melee weapon or {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, roll the {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} expended to cast the spell and regain a number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the numbered rolled.
Splattering Smite.name: Splattering Smite
Spray of Cards.entries.0: You spray a 15-foot cone of spectral cards. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes {@damage 2d10} force damage and has the {@condition blinded} condition until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only.
Spray of Cards.entriesHigherLevel.0.entr: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by {@scaledamage 2d10|2-9|1d10} for each slot level above 2nd.
Spray of Cards.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: На более высоких уровнях
Spray of Cards.name: Spray of Cards
Staggering Smite.entries.0: The target takes an extra {@damage 4d6} Psychic damage from the attack, and the target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of your next turn.
Staggering Smite.entriesHigherLevel.0.en: The extra damage increases by {@scaledamage 4d6|4-9|1d6} for each spell slot level above 4.
Staggering Smite.name: Staggering Smite
Starry Wisp.entries.0: Вы метаете сгусток света в одно существо или объект в пределах дистанции. Совершите по цели дальнобойную атаку заклинанием. При попадании цель получает {@damage 1d8} урона Излучением и до конца вашего следующего хода излучает {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB|Тусклый свет} радиусом 10 футов и не может получать преимуществ от состояния {@condition Invisible|XPHB|Невидимый}.
Starry Wisp.entriesHigherLevel.0.entries: Урон увеличивается на {@damage 1d8}, когда вы достигаете 5-го ({@damage 2d8}), 11-го ({@damage 3d8}) и 17-го ({@damage 4d8}) уровней.
Starry Wisp.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Улучшение заговора
Starry Wisp.name: Звёздный светлячок
Steal Immortality.components.m: the skull of a humanoid encrusted in gems worth 1,000+ GP, which the spell consumes
Steal Immortality.entries.0: As part of casting this spell, you must expend nine {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} or the spell automatically fails. Roll the {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} expended to cast the spell and gain a number of {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to twice the roll's total. You gain the creature type of the spell's target, in addition to your own type.
Steal Immortality.entries.1: While the spell lasts, you have {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition; you no longer need to eat, drink, or breathe; you have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; and you gain a benefit based on your new creature type:
Steal Immortality.entries.2.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Radiant and Necrotic damage and have a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 60 feet.
Steal Immortality.entries.2.name: Небожитель
Steal Immortality.entries.3.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, and Thunder damage.
Steal Immortality.entries.3.name: Элементаль
Steal Immortality.entries.4.entries.0: You can use a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition until the start of your next turn, or teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
Steal Immortality.entries.4.name: Фея
Steal Immortality.entries.5.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Cold and Fire damage and have a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 60 feet.
Steal Immortality.entries.5.name: Исчадие
Steal Immortality.entries.6.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Necrotic damage, and you have {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions.
Steal Immortality.entries.6.entries.1: You have the creature type and benefits until you cast the spell again, or you are reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.
Steal Immortality.entries.6.name: Нежить
Steal Immortality.name: Steal Immortality
Steel Wind Strike.entries.0: You flourish the weapon used in the casting and then vanish to strike like the wind. Choose up to five creatures you can see within range. Make a melee spell attack against each target. On a hit, a target takes {@damage 6d10} Force damage.
Steel Wind Strike.entries.1: You then teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within 5 feet of one of the targets.
Steel Wind Strike.name: Steel Wind Strike
Stinking Cloud.entries.0: You create a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} of yellow, nauseating gas centered on a point within range. The cloud is {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB}. The cloud lingers in the air for the duration or until a strong wind (such as the one created by {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}) disperses it.
Stinking Cloud.entries.1: Each creature that starts its turn in the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the current turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} in this way, the creature can't take an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.
Stinking Cloud.name: Stinking Cloud
Stone Shape.entries.0: You touch a stone object of Medium size or smaller or a section of stone no more than 5 feet in any dimension and form it into any shape you like. For example, you could shape a large rock into a weapon, statue, or coffer, or you could make a small passage through a wall that is 5 feet thick. You could also shape a stone door or its frame to seal the door shut. The object you create can have up to two hinges and a latch, but finer mechanical detail isn't possible.
Stone Shape.name: Stone Shape
Stoneskin.components.m: diamond dust worth 100+ GP, which the spell consumes
Stoneskin.entries.0: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Stoneskin.name: Stoneskin
Storm Sphere.entries.0: A 20-foot-radius sphere of whirling air springs into existence, centered on a point you choose within range. The sphere remains for the spell's duration. Each creature in the sphere when it appears or that ends its turn there must succeed on a Strength saving throw or take {@damage 2d6} bludgeoning damage. The sphere's space is {@quickref difficult terrain||3}.
Storm Sphere.entries.1: Until the spell ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to cause a bolt of lightning to leap from the center of the sphere toward one creature you choose within 60 feet of the center. Make a ranged spell attack. You have advantage on the attack roll if the target is in the sphere. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 4d6} lightning damage.
Storm Sphere.entries.2: Creatures within 30 feet of the sphere have disadvantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks made to listen.
Storm Sphere.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the damage for each of its effects increases by {@scaledamage 2d6;4d6|4-9|1d6} for each slot level above 4th.
Storm Sphere.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: На более высоких уровнях
Storm Sphere.name: Storm Sphere
Storm of Vengeance.entries.0: A churning storm cloud forms for the duration, centered on a point within range and spreading to a radius of 300 feet. Each creature under the cloud when it appears must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take {@damage 2d6} Thunder damage and have the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} condition for the duration.
Storm of Vengeance.entries.1: At the start of each of your later turns, the storm produces different effects, as detailed below.
Storm of Vengeance.entries.2.entries.0: Acidic rain falls. Each creature and object under the cloud takes {@damage 4d6} Acid damage.
Storm of Vengeance.entries.2.name: Turn 2
Storm of Vengeance.entries.3.entries.0: You call six bolts of lightning from the cloud to strike six different creatures or objects beneath it. Each target makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking {@damage 10d6} Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
Storm of Vengeance.entries.3.name: Turn 3
Storm of Vengeance.entries.4.entries.0: Hailstones rain down. Each creature under the cloud takes {@damage 2d6} Bludgeoning damage.
Storm of Vengeance.entries.4.name: Turn 4
Storm of Vengeance.entries.5.entries.0: Gusts and freezing rain assail the area under the cloud. Each creature there takes {@damage 1d6} Cold damage. Until the spell ends, the area is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} and {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB}, ranged attacks with weapons are impossible there, and strong wind blows through the area.
Storm of Vengeance.entries.5.name: Turns 5-10
Storm of Vengeance.name: Storm of Vengeance
Suffocate.entries.0: Вы создаёте пару хватающих рук из {@condition invisible|невидимой} силы. Совершите дальнобойную атаку заклинанием по существу, которое видите в пределах дистанции. При попадании существо получает состояние {@condition Restrained|XPHB|Опутан}. Пока на нём действует это состояние, оно не может дышать.
Suffocate.entries.1: Существо может задерживать дыхание на количество минут, равное 1 + модификатор Телосложения (минимум 30 секунд), после чего начинается удушение. Когда у существа заканчивается воздух или оно задыхается, оно получает 1 уровень {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB|Истощения} в конце каждого своего хода. Когда существо снова получает возможность дышать, оно теряет все уровни {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB|Истощения}, полученные из-за удушения.
Suffocate.entries.2: Существо, {@condition Restrained|XPHB|Опутанное} руками, может действием совершить проверку Силы ({@skill Athletics|XPHB|Атлетика}) против Сл спасброска ваших заклинаний. При успехе оно больше не {@condition Restrained|XPHB|Опутано}.
Suffocate.name: Удушение
Suggestion.entries.0: You suggest a course of activity—described in no more than 25 words—to one creature you can see within range that can hear and understand you. The suggestion must sound achievable and not involve anything that would obviously deal damage to the target or its allies. For example, you could say, "Fetch the key to the cult's treasure vault, and give the key to me." Or you could say, "Stop fighting, leave this library peacefully, and don't return."
Suggestion.entries.1: The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for the duration or until you or your allies deal damage to the target. The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target pursues the suggestion to the best of its ability. The suggested activity can continue for the entire duration, but if the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, the spell ends for the target upon completing it.
Suggestion.name: Suggestion
Summer Winds.entries.0: You unleash a blast of light and wind in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. Your allies in the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} regain {@dice 2d6} {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Undead within the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} that are {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} to you must make a Constitution saving throw, taking {@damage 2d6} Radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Summer Winds.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: The damage and healing increase by {@dice 2d6} for each spell slot level above 2.
Summer Winds.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Summer Winds.name: Summer Winds
Summon Aberration.components.m: a pickled tentacle and an eyeball in a platinum-inlaid vial worth 400+ GP
Summon Aberration.entries.0: You call forth an aberrant spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Aberrant Spirit|XPHB} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose Beholderkin, Mind Flayer, or Slaad. The creature resembles an Aberration of that kind, which determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Aberration.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, it shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Summon Aberration.entriesHigherLevel.0.e: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Aberration.name: Summon Aberration
Summon Beast.components.m: a feather, tuft of fur, and fish tail inside a gilded acorn worth 200+ GP
Summon Beast.entries.0: You call forth a bestial spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Bestial Spirit|XPHB} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose an environment: Air, Land, or Water. The creature resembles an animal of your choice that is native to the chosen environment, which determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Beast.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Summon Beast.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Beast.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Summon Beast.name: Summon Beast
Summon Celestial.entries.0: You call forth a Celestial spirit. It manifests in an angelic form in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Celestial Spirit|XPHB} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose Avenger or Defender. Your choice determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Celestial.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Summon Celestial.entriesHigherLevel.0.en: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Celestial.name: Summon Celestial
Summon Construct.entries.0: You call forth the spirit of a Construct. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Construct Spirit|XPHB} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose a material: Clay, Metal, or Stone. The creature resembles an animate statue (you determine the appearance) made of the chosen material, which determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Construct.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Summon Construct.entriesHigherLevel.0.en: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Construct.name: Summon Construct
Summon Dragon.components.m: an object with the image of a dragon engraved on it worth 500+ GP
Summon Dragon.entries.0: You call forth a Dragon spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Draconic Spirit|XPHB} stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Dragon.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Summon Dragon.entriesHigherLevel.0.entri: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Dragon.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Summon Dragon.name: Summon Dragon
Summon Elemental.components.m: air, a pebble, ash, and water inside a gold-inlaid vial worth 400+ GP
Summon Elemental.entries.0: You call forth an Elemental spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Elemental Spirit|XPHB} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose an element: Air, Earth, Fire, or Water. The creature resembles a bipedal form wreathed in the chosen element, which determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Elemental.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Summon Elemental.entriesHigherLevel.0.en: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Elemental.name: Summon Elemental
Summon Fey.entries.0: You call forth a Fey spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Fey Spirit|XPHB} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose a mood: Fuming, Mirthful, or Tricksy. The creature resembles a Fey creature of your choice marked by the chosen mood, which determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Fey.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Fey.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Summon Fey.name: Summon Fey
Summon Fiend.entries.0: You call forth a fiendish spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the {@creature Fiendish Spirit|XPHB} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose Demon, Devil, or Yugoloth. The creature resembles a Fiend of the chosen type, which determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Fiend.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
Summon Fiend.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Fiend.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Summon Fiend.name: Summon Fiend
Summon Greater Demon.components.m: a vial of blood from a humanoid killed within the past 24 hours
Summon Greater Demon.entries.0: You utter foul words, summoning one demon from the chaos of the Abyss. You choose the demon's type, which must be {@filter one of challenge rating 5 or lower|bestiary|challenge rating=[&0;&5]|tag=demon|miscellaneous=!swarm}, such as a {@creature shadow demon} or a {@creature barlgura}. The demon appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range, and the demon disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.
Summon Greater Demon.entries.1: Roll initiative for the demon, which has its own turns. When you summon it and on each of your turns thereafter, you can issue a verbal command to it (requiring no action on your part), telling it what it must do on its next turn. If you issue no command, it spends its turn attacking any creature within reach that has attacked it.
Summon Greater Demon.entries.2: At the end of each of the demon's turns, it makes a Charisma saving throw. The demon has disadvantage on this saving throw if you say its true name. On a failed save, the demon continues to obey you. On a successful save, your control of the demon ends for the rest of the duration, and the demon spends its turns pursuing and attacking the nearest non-demons to the best of its ability. If you stop {@status concentration||concentrating} on the spell before it reaches its full duration, an uncontrolled demon doesn't disappear for {@dice 1d6} rounds if it still has hit points.
Summon Greater Demon.entries.3: As part of casting the spell, you can form a circle on the ground with the blood used as a material component. The circle is large enough to encompass your space. While the spell lasts, the summoned demon can't cross the circle or harm it, and it can't target anyone within it. Using the material component in this manner consumes it when the spell ends.
When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the challenge rating increases by 1 for each slot level above 4th.
Summon Greater Demon.name: Summon Greater Demon
Summon Lesser Demons.components.m: a vial of blood from a humanoid killed within the past 24 hours
Summon Lesser Demons.entries.0: You utter foul words, summoning demons from the chaos of the Abyss. Roll on the following table to determine what appears.
Summon Lesser Demons.entries.1.rows.0.1: Two {@filter demons of challenge rating 1 or lower|bestiary|challenge rating=[&0;&1]|tag=demon|miscellaneous=!swarm}
Summon Lesser Demons.entries.1.rows.1.1: Four {@filter demons of challenge rating 1/2 or lower|bestiary|challenge rating=[&0;&1/2]|tag=demon|miscellaneous=!swarm}
Summon Lesser Demons.entries.1.rows.2.1: Eight {@filter demons of challenge rating 1/4 or lower|bestiary|challenge rating=[&0;&1/4]|tag=demon|miscellaneous=!swarm}
Summon Lesser Demons.entries.2: The DM chooses the demons, such as {@creature manes} or {@creature dretch||dretches}, and you choose the unoccupied spaces you can see within range where they appear. A summoned demon disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.
Summon Lesser Demons.entries.3: The demons are hostile to all creatures, including you. Roll initiative for the summoned demons as a group, which has its own turns. The demons pursue and attack the nearest non-demons to the best of their ability.
Summon Lesser Demons.entries.4: As part of casting the spell, you can form a circle on the ground with the blood used as a material component. The circle is large enough to encompass your space. While the spell lasts, the summoned demons can't cross the circle or harm it, and they can't target anyone within it. Using the material component in this manner consumes it when the spell ends.
When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th or 7th level, you summon twice as many demons. If you cast it using a spell slot of 8th or 9th level, you summon three times as many demons.
Summon Lesser Demons.name: Summon Lesser Demons
Summon Plant.components.m: a ceramic pot filled with herbs and fertilizer worth at least 200 GP
Summon Plant.entries.0: You call forth a plant spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space you can see within range. This corporeal form uses the {@creature Plant Spirit|GrimHollowPG24} stat block. When you cast the spell, choose a floral feature: Blooming, Oaken, or Thorny. The creature resembles an animated plant marked by the chosen floral feature, which determines one of the traits in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or when the spell ends.
Summon Plant.entries.1: The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action and uses its move to avoid danger.
Summon Plant.entriesHigherLevel.0.entrie: Используйте уровень ячейки заклинания в качестве уровня заклинания в блоке характеристик.
Summon Plant.entriesHigherLevel.0.name: Используя ячейку заклинания большего уровня
Summon Plant.name: Summon Plant
